StarryUniGraph
  • Module code
  • starry_unigraph.runtime.base

Source code for starry_unigraph.runtime.base

"""Base runtime protocol and backward-compat adapter ABCs.

Defines:

- :class:`RuntimeProtocol` — minimal abstract interface for any graph
  computation paradigm (Flare DTDG, CTDG online, etc.).
- :class:`RuntimeAdapter` / :class:`ExecutionAdapter` / :class:`GraphProvider`
  — legacy abstract base classes used by :mod:`providers.common`.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from typing import Any, Iterable

from starry_unigraph.types import PredictionResult, PreparedArtifacts, RuntimeBundle, SessionContext




[docs]
class RuntimeProtocol(ABC):
    """Minimal runtime interface for all graph computation paradigms.

    Implementations should provide batch iteration, a single-step
    forward/backward, and state serialization.

    Example subclass usage::

        class MyRuntime(RuntimeProtocol):
            def iter_batches(self, split, **kw):
                for batch in self.loader(split):
                    yield batch
            def step(self, batch, training):
                loss = self.model(batch)
                if training:
                    loss.backward()
                return {"loss": float(loss)}
            def state_dict(self):
                return self.model.state_dict()
            def load_state_dict(self, state):
                self.model.load_state_dict(state)
    """



[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def iter_batches(self, split: str, **kwargs: Any) -> Iterable[Any]:
        ...





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def step(self, batch: Any, training: bool) -> dict[str, Any]:
        ...





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def state_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        ...





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def load_state_dict(self, state: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        ...






# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Backward-compat aliases (used by providers/common.py)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------



[docs]
class RuntimeAdapter(ABC):


[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def init_model(self, session_ctx: SessionContext) -> Any:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def init_optimizer(self, session_ctx: SessionContext, model: Any) -> Any:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def load_runtime_state(self, runtime: RuntimeBundle, state: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def dump_runtime_state(self, runtime: RuntimeBundle) -> dict[str, Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError








[docs]
class ExecutionAdapter(ABC):


[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def train_step(self, runtime: RuntimeBundle, batch: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def eval_step(self, runtime: RuntimeBundle, batch: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def predict_step(self, runtime: RuntimeBundle, batch: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError








[docs]
class GraphProvider(ABC):
    graph_mode = "base"

    def __init__(self, task_adapter: Any):
        self.task_adapter = task_adapter
        self.prepared: PreparedArtifacts | None = None
        self.runtime = RuntimeBundle()



[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def prepare_data(self, session_ctx: SessionContext) -> PreparedArtifacts:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def build_runtime(self, session_ctx: SessionContext) -> RuntimeBundle:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def build_train_iterator(self, session_ctx: SessionContext, split: str = "train") -> Iterable[Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def build_eval_iterator(self, session_ctx: SessionContext, split: str = "val") -> Iterable[Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def build_predict_iterator(self, session_ctx: SessionContext, split: str = "test") -> Iterable[Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def run_train_step(self, batch: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def run_eval_step(self, batch: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError





[docs]
    @abstractmethod
    def run_predict_step(self, batch: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError
